title: Rate & Accumulation (Riemann Sums)
stimulus:

where W(cid:11)t(cid:12) is measured in degrees Fahrenheit and t is measured in minutes. At time t (cid:32) 0, the temperature of

times t for the first 20 minutes are given in the table above.
